Kaiya is always very consistent with the sales process and has been constantly engaged in the chat. Kaiya has delivered phenomenal results month in and month out since joining our company and we are honored to have Kaiya as such an integral part of our business! Thank you, Kaiya!!!!

🏆 Contest 🏆

We will be giving away a $200 gift card every single day from today (April 24th) to April 29th. How to win: Be the top seller in XM, watches, and tablets each day. The person that sells the most XM, watches and tablets for the entirety of the contest will win an additional $200! Also, you can win multiple days! Any tie breakers will be decided by total Plus lines vs select lines...so sell all in and let's win together!
